Description: Unique identifier assigned to each conflict in the dataset
Country where the conflict takes place
Primary actor on side A (usually the government of a state)
Numeric identifier for the main actor on side A
Secondary actor or supporting group on side A
Numeric identifier for the main actor on side B
Secondary actor or supporting group on side B
Main issue of the conflict such as government control or territorial control
Name of the territory if the conflict concerns a specific region
Year of the observation in which the conflict activity is recorded
Level of conflict intensity (1 = minor conflict
Indicates whether the conflict has ever reached war-level intensity
Year when the conflict first began
Exact starting date of the conflict if available
Indicates whether the conflict episode ended in that year
